_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With momentum exhausted and no decisive break in either direction, the consensus is that we chop within Anxiety until either volume-backed strength or a VIX spike forces a leg.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD with low conviction citing divergences and self-admitted direction misses; narrative implies a bullish coiling setup with high confidence, leaning toward an eventual UP break.
next_move.confirmed_if: BTC breaks $70k with volume + funding rising above 0.02% + fear_greed jumps above 35
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC breaks below $62k with VIX spiking above 22 + DXY breaking 103
